title: Regex Visualizer
description: A utility for visualizing how regular expressions work through interactive diagrams and live pattern testing.
overview: Regex Visualizer is a developer tool designed to help understand and debug regular expressions through visual representations. Instead of reading complex patterns line by line, developers can see how the regex engine interprets each token in a structured visual flow.
problem: Regular expressions are powerful but notoriously difficult to read and debug. Many developers struggle to understand complex patterns, especially when expressions contain multiple groups, quantifiers and conditions.
solution: The tool parses a regular expression into individual tokens and converts them into a visual flow representation. Each part of the expression becomes a node in a diagram, helping developers understand how the pattern is interpreted and executed.

features.title: Regex Input
features.description: Write or paste a regular expression to analyze and visualize.

features.title: Pattern Parser
features.description: Break the regular expression into structured tokens and groups.

features.title: Visual Diagram
features.description: Generate a visual flow that represents how the regex engine evaluates the pattern.

features.title: Live Test Strings
features.description: Test strings against the regex and see matching segments highlighted in real time.

architecture:
RegexVisualizer
│
├── RegexInput
├── TestStringInput
├── RegexDiagram
│    └── RegexNode
│
├── useRegexParser (hook)
│
└── parseRegex (logic)
implementation:
const tokens = regex.split(/(\(|\)|\+|\*|\?|\|)/)

return tokens.map(token => ({ type: 'token', value: token }))

developmentFlow.title: Idea
developmentFlow.description: Create a developer tool to visualize how regex patterns work.

developmentFlow.title: Parser Design
developmentFlow.description: Build a parser that converts regex patterns into tokens.

developmentFlow.title: Diagram System
developmentFlow.description: Design a node-based diagram to represent regex execution flow.

developmentFlow.title: Interaction
developmentFlow.description: Allow users to test strings and highlight matches dynamically.

developmentFlow.title: Testing
developmentFlow.description: Validate parsing accuracy and ensure correct visualization of patterns.

lessons: Understanding how regex engines process tokens sequentially.
Designing visual representations for abstract programming concepts.
Building parser logic for pattern interpretation.
Managing interactive diagrams within a React UI.
nextSteps: Support advanced regex features like lookaheads and lookbehinds.
Integrate regex explanation generated by AI.
